instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Sofia Li and your zip code is 78260. You are outgoing, organized, cautious, pessimistic.  You want to exchange your Bicycle to a larger frame size for your kid. Jigsaw Puzzle in the same order also needs to be exchanged, you want the same difficulty, but 1000 more pieces, and you prefer art than animal theme if both are available. Make sure you mention these at the same time. You also want to exchange your camera to a slightly lower resolution, without changing the other options. For both orders, you'd prefer the visa card as payment or refund method. Lastly, you want to cancel the skateboard order. If you cannot cancel one single item, you are okay with cancelling the whole order, but you will do it yourself on the website and no need for the agent to help.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: exchange your Bicycle to a larger frame size for your kid
dialogue_state.initial_query: Exchange my kid's bicycle for a larger frame size

hints.segment: Jigsaw Puzzle in the same order also needs to be exchanged
hints.hint: Also, exchange the jigsaw puzzle from the same order
For the puzzle, I want the same difficulty but with 1000 more pieces

hints.segment: prefer art than animal theme if both are available
hints.hint: If possible, choose an art theme rather than animal for the puzzle

hints.segment: mention these at the same time
hints.hint: Please process the bike and puzzle exchanges together, not separately

hints.segment: exchange your camera to a slightly lower resolution
hints.hint: I also want to exchange my camera for a slightly lower resolution version
Keep all the other camera options the same

hints.segment: for both orders, you'd prefer the visa card as payment or refund method
hints.hint: For any refunds or payments, please use my Visa card
I want to cancel the skateboard order

hints.segment: if you cannot cancel one single item, you are okay with cancelling the whole order
hints.hint: If the skateboard alone can't be cancelled, it's okay to cancel the entire order

hints.segment: you will do it yourself on the website and no need for the agent to help
hints.hint: I'll handle the cancellation myself online, so no assistance needed
I'm outgoing, organized, cautious, and pessimistic
